nodes.label: Integration manager for pressure graph with Sentinel stores.  Bridges issues_sto

Initialize pressure graph manager.                  Args:             session_id
Pull current data from stores if signals were missed.
Persist current graph state to DB.
Return graph state as DTO-compatible dict.
Connect to Sentinel store change signals.
Initialize sub-engines when graph has data.
Handle new issues from issues_store.         Converts issues to pressure nodes.
Handle new killchain edges from killchain_store.         Converts killchain edge
Handle new findings from findings_store.         Converts findings to pressure n
Manually ingest a list of findings (e.g. from HTTP hydrator).
Handle real-time events for physics effects.                  Currently handles:
Materialize a failure as a physical object in the graph.                  Physic
Convert issue/finding to pressure node.                  Mapping:         - seve
Convert killchain edge to pressure edge.
Mark which nodes are crown jewels (critical assets).                  These are
Find assets marked as critical or inferred from node values.
Populate crown jewels automatically when none are set.
Recompute all pressures given current graph state.
Generate comprehensive pressure report.                  This is the main output
Find top N critical attack paths to crown jewels.                  Critical = hi
Find chokepoints - nodes/edges whose removal maximally reduces crown-jewel press
DFS to find path from node to any crown jewel.
Find entry points (nodes with no inbound edges).
Directly increase pressure on a node (e.g., from Fuzzing Feedback).
